programme.title: Hidden Habitats
programme.desc: A giant kelp forest hosts a diverse marine ecology in Monterey Bay, Calif., balanced by the sea otter.

programme.title: Stripes
programme.desc: A lazy New York cabby (Bill Murray) quits his job and convinces his bored buddy (Harold Ramis) they should join the Army.

programme.title: Groundhog Day
programme.desc: February 2nd keeps repeating for a cynical TV weatherman (Bill Murray) sent to watch the groundhog in Punxsutawney, Pa.

programme.title: A League of Their Own
programme.desc: The All-American Girls Professional Baseball League begins in 1943 with a major-league has-been as a manager.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: A recent college graduate lands a job working for a famous and diabolical editor of a New York fashion magazine.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teen model's death leads Briscoe and Curtis to her parents in Baltimore; there they enlist detectives Munch and Falsone. (Concluding on

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a new mother's death and the disappearance of her baby, leading prosecutors to probe the husband's role in the affair.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bail bondsman's death leads detectives to a corrupt lawyer with a connection to the district attorney's office.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A killer's confession prompts detectives to reopen a deadly arson case involving a family with ties to Schiff.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A visiting doctor, thought to be a terrorist, becomes a suspect in the death of an Egyptian man; Ross learns the doctor specializes in female circumcision.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An accident that kills three people hits close to home for Curtis and brings back painful memories for McCoy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A forensic specialist is targeted by killers, challenging Briscoe and Curtis to find a suspect; McCoy and Ross turn up evidence on the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives search for the killer of a physician who had a dangerous sex life; an attorney maintains murders are a result of too much television.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives seek a motive for a man's brutal beating; Ross uncovers an unlikely accomplice in the assault case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives link a dead FBI witness to an overeager hit man and a gangster; Schiff pushes to prosecute the mob for the murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing death of a psychologist draws Detectives Briscoe and Curtis into a heated divorce case and pits McCoy and Ross against a manipulative attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A girl's death at a party provides a puzzle for Briscoe and Curtis; McCoy and Ross work around the margins of law.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives try to find out what happened to a woman who was found unconscious at the bottom of her apartment stairs.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Questions about how animals adapt to the worlds built by the planet's most invasive species, humans; a search for loot to steal with macaques in Bali; hunting for easy eats with bears in Lake Tahoe; whale poo help fish populations bounce back.

programme.title: Planet Earth III
programme.desc: Exploring forests as hidden worlds where the lives of animals are entwined, including temperate forests home to whistling wild dogs, as well as rainforests where ninja treehoppers fight off assassin bugs.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: An examination of the often-not-seen life that inhabits the deserts of Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: It is high summer in the polar regions, and the sun never sets; many species take advantage of the easier conditions, but summer is a tough time for the polar bear family, as their ice world melts away and the cubs take their first swimming lesson.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough travels from the Arctic to the Antarctic to discover magical new ice worlds inhabited by the most extraordinary animal survivors on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: The highlights from the series; a view of the entire polar year from winter through summer.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Polar landscapes in autumn are transformed as the big freeze returns; in the Arctic, polar bears gather in large numbers on the coast to wait for the return of the ice; off the coast 2,000 beluga whales head for a special estuary.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Winter is the greatest test for life in the polar regions; in the Arctic, a female polar bear treks into the mountains to give birth; out on the frozen ocean, the entire population of the world's spectacled eider ducks braves the winter.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Human survival in polar areas relies on ancient wisdom and modern science; a look at the riches and wonders of the polar regions and the people that have been visiting them for thousands of years.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Frozen Planet
programme.desc: Spring in the polar regions; the greatest seasonal transformation of the planet begins with the return of the sun.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi returns to Okinawa with his karate student and meets an old foe's challenge to a duel.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A New Jersey teen moves to California, meets bullies and learns karate from a handyman, Mr. Miyagi.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part II
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi returns to Okinawa with his karate student and meets an old foe's challenge to a duel.

programme.title: The Karate Kid
programme.desc: A New Jersey teen moves to California, meets bullies and learns karate from a handyman, Mr. Miyagi.

programme.title: The Karate Kid Part III
programme.desc: Mr. Miyagi and his student open a bonsai-tree shop, then fight thugs sent by a millionaire toxic-waste dumper.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.desc: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena and the absurdity confronting America with humor and satire.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.desc: Rick Leventhal delivers comprehensive analysis and interviews on current affairs and significant events from home and abroad.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: White House Usher: The Inside Story
programme.desc: White House Usher Chris Emery served under Presidents Reagan, Bush and Clinton; he saw it all; discover the secret lives of the First Families.

programme.title: The Dean Martin Celebrity Roast: Evel Knievel
programme.desc: Dean Martin hosts a celebrity roast of daredevil Evel Knievel.

programme.title: The Hitler Home Movies
programme.desc: Secluded deep in the Bavarian Alps, Hitler, his family and closest allies hid away, issuing orders for armies across Europe while they relaxed, dined and enjoyed an otherworldly peace.

programme.title: Josef Mengele: Hunting a Nazi Criminal
programme.desc: He was one of the most notorious Nazi war criminals, infamous for his deadly experiments on twins. But at the end of WWII, he simply disappeared. Despite a global manhunt by Mossad and the allies, he would die a free man, 34 years later, in Brazil.

programme.title: Bible Land With Sergio and Rhoda
programme.desc: Today's modern town of Cana might not be the ancient Cana where Jesus turned water into wine, so Rhoda and Sergio set out for an adventure to find the real location.

programme.title: Bible Land With Sergio and Rhoda
programme.desc: Chorazin, the ancient cursed city, is being reexcavated by archaeologist Achia Kohn-Tavor to find out if the synagogue truly dates to the first century.

programme.title: The Land of Israel With Jon Voight: God's Story
programme.desc: Jon Voight recounts tales of Abraham and his lineage staying holy during eras of bad behavior.

programme.title: The Land of Israel With Jon Voight: God's Story
programme.desc: Jon Voight looks at Mount Gerizim, where Abraham and his flock stopped on his entry to the land of Canaan at God's direction.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.title: The Big Focus
programme.desc: John Bachman focuses on the biggest news from D.C., N.Y., and around America.

programme.desc: Greg Kelly provides hard-hitting reports and analysis from Los Angeles to New York and the Beltway to the Rust Belt.

programme.title: Tactical Wealth: From Military to Money
programme.desc: Hosted by former Navy SEAL Kaj Larsen, Tactical Wealth explores life after service, business, and building wealth.

programme.desc: Carl Higbie gives common-sense news analysis, exposes government and media bias, as he fights for American values.

programme.title: David Harris Jr. The Pulse
programme.desc: Hard-hitting analysis and opinion on the latest news and events delivered.

programme.title: Rob Schmitt This Week
programme.desc: Rob Schmitt wraps up all the latest news and opinion and sets the stage for tomorrow.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: An intense look into the unpredictable nature of traffic stops and the challenges officers face as they balance maintaining order with responding to unforeseen chaos.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Through police bodycam footage, viewers experience the intense moments of a burglary in progress, followed by high-speed chases, and the startling arrest of an officer for DUI.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: The human side of policing - sheds light on the challenges, emotions, and ethical dilemmas officers face as they work to protect their communities while confronting their own vulnerabilities.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Candid moments and hilarious interactions where split-second decisions about food can lead to wild confrontations, surprising choices, and unpredictable outcomes.

programme.title: Cops Under Fire
programme.desc: Crime and killings are sweeping the nation and Chicago is ground zero; a street cop discusses the state of crime in America and on the streets.

programme.title: Nuclear Now
programme.desc: With unprecedented access to the nuclear industry in France, Russia and the United States, filmmaker Oliver Stone explores the possibility of overcoming the challenges of climate change and energy poverty through the power of nuclear energy.

programme.title: To the Shores of Iwo Jima
programme.desc: The American assault on the Japanese-held island of Iwo Jima and the battle that raged on that key island in the Allied advance on Japan.

programme.title: Doolittle's Raiders: A Final Toast
programme.desc: The surviving members of Doolittle's Raiders -- the flyers who took part in the April 18, 1942, raid on Japan -- hold their final toast.

programme.title: Nazis on the Run
programme.desc: The US army is catching up, entering Berlin with a firm plan to capture as many Nazi officials as they can, their aim to bring them before a court on trial for the atrocities they helped make possible.

programme.title: Nazis on the Run
programme.desc: Twenty-four Nazi officials are brought into the courtroom at Nuremberg, Germany; the biggest trial in history is about to begin; for the first time in international law, the Nuremberg indictments also mention crimes of genocide.

programme.title: Wake Up America Early
programme.desc: Presents news delivering key facts, expert insights, and in-depth analysis to kickstart your day.

programme.title: Wake Up America
programme.desc: Starting the day with real news and analysis.

programme.desc: Your source for up-to-the-minute breaking news; the ideal way to stay informed with eye-opening coverage that makes sense of the stories that affect our lives every day.

programme.title: The Dean Martin Celebrity Roast: Sammy Davis Jr.
programme.desc: Sammy Davis Jr.is roasted by his peers.

programme.title: The Dean Martin Celebrity Roast: Jack Klugman
programme.desc: From the MGM Grand Hotel's Ziegfeld Room in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Ronald Reagan: His Winning Wit
programme.desc: President Reagan was known as the great communicator; he established a bond with his audience and endeared himself to his fellow Americans; some of his funniest and greatest moments and how he became one of our nation's most beloved presidents.

programme.title: The 80s: Decade of Decision
programme.desc: Greed was good during the decadent 80s, and so were big hair, big shoulders, and even bigger 401ks; the 80s was the era of Reaganomics, Rubik's Cube, Madonna, Rambo, the Macintosh, Mario Brothers, Chernobyl, flying DeLoreans, and so much more.

programme.title: The 90s: Decade of Change
programme.desc: With baby boomers coming of age, the 1990s usher in a new era of peace and prosperity in America.

programme.title: Choose Life: It's Worth It
programme.desc: Women who made the decision to place their babies for adoption, and people adopted as infants share their compelling stories.

programme.title: The World Seen From the Vatican
programme.desc: All the latest news about Pope, the Vatican, and other related social and political issues.

programme.title: God And America's 250th
programme.desc: Explore how faith shaped America's founding, history, and moral compass through the belief that rights come from a Creator, not government.

programme.title: Daybreak
programme.desc: Join hosts Steve and Ivie Gruber as they get your day started.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Hunter Nation
programme.desc: Real America's Voice

programme.title: The War Room
programme.desc: Steve Bannon and the team brings important news from around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Are you stressed as you wait for something to change? Today, Joyce discusses ways to calm down as you wait for the change only God can bring.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Praying for the coming golden age.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Advice for success in life from the book of Proverbs.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Trying to do everything on your own? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to trust God more and stop living frustrated and worn out.

programme.title: Creflo Dollar
programme.desc: Dr. Creflo Dollar ministers to people from all backgrounds with hopes for change; Creflo helps viewers find ways to renew their faith, mind, and spirit; Creflo and his wife Taffi share their vision for everyone to understand God's love and promises.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: What does it mean to live with a faith-filled function? In this powerful message, pastor Matt Hagee teaches from Ephesians 1:19-23, showing how the church was formed by God, filled with His Spirit and created to function in unity and power.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: How to stop feeding doubt and start feeding your faith.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick at Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., gives inspirational messages.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Trying to do everything on your own? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to trust God more and stop living frustrated and worn out.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh, Faith Eury Cho, Irene Rollins, Debra Fileta, and Alexandra Hoover share deeply personal struggles with disappointment and how to forge resilient hope.

programme.title: Andrew Wommack: Gospel Truth
programme.desc: Andrew shares life-changing lessons we can learn from the life of David and how God looks at the heart of men.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Praying for the coming golden age.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: Pastor Steven Furtick at Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., gives inspirational messages.

programme.title: Harvest With Pastor Greg Laurie
programme.desc: Join Pastor Greg Laurie for a time of encouragement, worship, and Bible study.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: See Jesus in the Old Testament through types, shadows and Bible stories explained.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: In Empty Out the Negative, Joel Osteen provides us with biblical tools to combat negative thoughts and feelings that weigh us down so that we can have the abundant life that we were meant to live.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Let There Be Light
programme.desc: Joan Sisk's life has been changed through the Revelation of His word in her life and brings His ministry to help others in coming to the Light of Him.

programme.desc: The Mount of Beatitudes as the Galileans would have experienced; Chaim Malespin meets Sheila at the Church of Beatitudes in Capernaum.

programme.title: Boots on the Ground
programme.desc: Factual in-depth information about the ongoing war, providing viewers with clear insight into tactical maneuvers and key military events.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: When one woman breaks off her relationship with a boyfriend she says abused and stalked her, he moves on to something even worse.

programme.title: 1st Look
programme.desc: A journey through the historic port cities on the Sail4th 250 route, uncovering the maritime waterways that shaped the nation and continue to bring its living history to life today.

programme.title: Fast: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Rescuing a house in Weir, Miss. after it was damaged by a massive storm; transforming the property into a vintage country themed home.

programme.title: Raw Travel
programme.desc: Visiting the small mountain towns of western North Carolina and eastern Tennessee to explore their unique artisan culture.

programme.title: News10NBC Saturday Today at 6AM
programme.desc: News10NBC Today provides live breaking news, First Alert Weather forecasts and exclusive investigative and enterprise reporting to the Rochester, NY region.

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom Protecting the Wild
programme.desc: Embarking on a scaly adventure from Texas to Florida to help rescue two of North America's most radical reptiles, Peter visits a nursery where baby lizards are raised while Dr. Rae teams up with a trained dog that can sniff out horned lizards.

programme.title: Earth Odyssey With Dylan Dreyer
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer voyages to Australia to meet kickboxing kangaroos, playful whales and the fearsome Tasmanian devil.

programme.title: 2026 Tour de France
programme.desc: Coverage of the 113th edition of the cycling event.

programme.title: Wild Child
programme.desc: Sheinelle Jones explores North America's iconic animals, including mountain lion cubs, a manatee mom and baby, and moose calves learning to cross forest streams.

programme.title: Forever Young With Dr. Pablo Prichard
programme.desc: When it comes to cancer, time can be the greatest ally, or the toughest enemy; Danielle and Dr. Pablo meet two women whose experiences reveal both sides of that truth; Danielle Fishel caught cancer early, while Betsy survived late-stage cancer.

programme.title: 2026 MLB Draft
programme.desc: The best prospects from colleges and high schools around the U.S. and beyond are on hand to see if their big league dreams are about to come true. From Pennsylvania Convention Center in Philadelphia.

programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: While skiing at Mt. Baker, Francis discovered a snowboarder trapped beneath the snow and heroically saved his life; with the help of his wife, Hope, he plays the wall in hopes of winning big.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman goes missing and investigators uncover her husband's chilling history including dark secrets about another missing wife.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: Celebrating America's 250th Birthday early with a preview of what's to come on July 4th.

programme.title: Access Hollywood
programme.desc: Hosts Mario Lopez, Kit Hoover, Scott Evans and Zuri Hall take viewers behind the velvet ropes and onto the red carpet to deliver celebrity interviews and entertainment news stories in Hollywood.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: As a dense fog rolls in off the coast of Virginia, a female sailor vanishes from a navy base; once the fog lifts, NCIS agents discover the horrifying nature of her disappearance.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: Homes that are curated for living in luxury and style.

programme.title: Beautiful Homes & Great Estates
programme.desc: A tropical oasis with spectacular views of the Santa Monica Mountains and Pacific Ocean; the mansion boasts five spacious bedrooms and eights baths.
